title: Spanish Semolina Casserole
description: A warm, comforting casserole perfect for a cozy evening. This Spanish-inspired dish combines fluffy semolina with savory flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine semolina and warm water. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Divide the dough into two equal parts.
Roll out each part into a thin sheet.
Brush with olive oil (if using) and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
Fold the sheets in half lengthwise, then in half again.
Place the folded dough in a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Beat the fluffy eggs in a separate bowl and pour over the dough.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
